subcodes.first_line: This is the day wherein all that dwelleth in the garden hath been stirred to rapture, for the breezes of the All-Merciful have wafted over it with spirit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه اخذ الاهتزاز ما فی البستان لان نسائم الرحمن مرت علیه بالروح و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
